name: Bug Report

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## To Reproduce
Minimal code to reproduce the issue:

```python
from chatstore import ChatService
# your code here
```

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Include the full error traceback.

## Environment
- Python version: <!-- python --version -->
- chatstore version: <!-- pip show chatstore -->
- OS:
- Using `[semantic]` extra? <!-- yes / no -->
